name: State College Food Bank
notes: Doors open at 1:00 pm. Please do not arrive before 1:00 pm. If you choose to do so - plan for various types of weather. Clients will be served on a first-come - first-served basis. All clients must arrive and be checked in by 4:30 pm on Mondays and 3:30 pm on Wednesdays and Fridays. NEW CLIENTS: Due to the amount of time needed to process a new client receiving a first-time grocery distribution - ALL NEW CLIENTS should come to the Food Bank on a Monday - Wednesday - or Friday between 2:00-3:00 pm for their first distribution. Clients will need to provide proof-of-address for everyone in their household. Clients who are eligible and have been approved by the Food Bank for call-ahead grocery pick-up must call 48-hours in advance to schedule their pick-up.
